# Python dependencies for the pig squeal acoustic feature-extraction pipeline
# Tested with Python 3.11
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt

# Core scientific computing
numpy>=1.21.0
scipy>=1.7.0
pandas>=1.3.0

# Audio processing (used for pitch estimation utilities in svfel.utils.tft)
librosa>=0.9.0

# Used by svfel.features.entropy (KDTree-based entropy estimation)
scikit-learn>=0.24.0

# Progress bars for the directory scan and consolidation steps
tqdm>=4.62.0

# Imported by svfel (spectral/LPC modules); no plots are generated by
# the extraction pipeline itself, but the import is required at load time
matplotlib>=3.4.0

# Excel output (consolidate_features.py) and header color-coding
openpyxl>=3.0.0
